title: [FMCS-M] fps X media X crystal x survival Optimized MEDIUM
description: A balanced modpack designed for Crystal PvP, media creation, and smooth survival gameplay
body:
# 🟧 FMCS‑M — Medium Edition
## fps × media × crystal × survival

## 📘 Overview
FMCS‑M is the balanced edition: a mix of high performance and improved visuals.  
It preserves strong FPS while adding cleaner graphics, smoother animations, and a more polished overall look — all without exceeding medium GPU load.

> [!TIP]
> Recommended for most players.

---

## 🎯 Purpose
- Provide a balanced visual + performance experience  
- Suitable for Crystal PvP, survival, content creation, and light media use  
- Maintain stable frame‑time while improving the appearance  
- Offer a visually cleaner environment than Lite Edition

---

## ✨ Features
- Same performance foundation as FMCS‑L  
- Light visual enhancements that do not heavily impact FPS  
- Improved entity appearance and world clarity  
- Clean transitions, smoother rendering, and quality‑of‑life improvements  
- Optional shader compatibility (light usage only)  
- Balanced configuration for both PvP and Media workflows

---

## 🧪 Expected Performance
- 3x FPS  
- 6x optimize
- 6x smooth
- 4x options
 
---

## 🔗 Other Editions
- [FMCS‑L (Lite Edition)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l)  
- [FMCS‑H (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-h)
- [FMCS‑S (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-s)

> [!NOTE]
> For weak GPUs → [FMCS‑L](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l)  
> 
> For mid GPUs → [FMCS‑M](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-m) 
> 
> For nicer visuals → [FMCS‑H](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-h)
> 
> For servers → [FMCS‑S](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-s)
